rows.label: qev030402_MSG0001
rows.name:
Excellent quick thinking there,
na! Heh, my old man really sent an
amazing person to help me, da! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030402_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask why he was told to join the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030402_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell him to hurry back to everyone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030402_MSG0002
rows.name:
...They figured if I, the Chieftain's son, betrayed
them, the unity of the Tree Clan would crumble, na.
That's why they were telling me to join the Growth, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030402_MSG0003
rows.name:
It's a foolish idea, da. There
isn't a single cowardly bastard
like that among us, na! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030402_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Alright! I'll head back
first, zo. I have to put my
old man's mind at ease, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030402_MSG0005
rows.name:
Yeah! I have to put my old man's mind at
ease, na. I'll head back first, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030402_MSG0006
rows.name:
Let's meet again! O wise
one, like the Dolphera! [ST:wait ]
